examples: He put his hand there and uttered this incantation impressively: "What hasn't come here, come!"
"Don't be evil" is a vague incantation.
As ".com" became The Street's magical incantation, Internet-related IPOs gained an average 242% last year.
And could you imagine Gandalf plodding his way through a spell book instead of issuing a majestic incantation?
